_comment: Default corpus catalog shipped with Veritate. Each entry's stem is the on-disk basename (foo -> foo_train.bin / foo_val.bin in trainers/corpus/). format='raw_bytes' = direct URL written as a uint8 byte stream (Veritate trains byte-level, so plaintext bytes ARE tokens). format='hf_dataset' = stream rows from a HuggingFace dataset, encode each text column as UTF-8, separate rows with two newlines. format='native' = the bins ship inside the repo at veritate_mri/data/corpus/; install copies them into trainers/corpus/ with no network, and sizes are read from the bundled files. max_bytes_train caps how much of streaming HF data is written before stopping. val_split_ratio carves off the tail of the downloaded train file as val.bin when no separate val source is supplied. recommended_min_params / _max_params drive the training-tab size-mismatch warning. The dashboard prompts the user for confirmation before installing any corpus larger than 10 GB; the backend additionally requires confirm_large=true in the install body for those.

corpora.label: Chat (small, 50 MB)
corpora.description: Conversations that teach a model how to chat. 50 MB. Recommended for tiny models (10M-80M parameters). Covers facts, definitions, simple math, classic prose. Hosted at carpathian-llc/Veritate-Corpus.

corpora.label: Chat (medium, 500 MB)
corpora.description: Same chat content as the small corpus at 10x scale. 500 MB. Recommended for mid-size models (200M-1B parameters).

corpora.label: Chat (large, 5 GB)
corpora.description: Same chat content as the small corpus at 100x scale. 5 GB. Recommended for large models (1B-50B parameters).

corpora.label: Agent tools (small, 15 MB)
corpora.description: Teaches the model to call tools (calculator, etc.) inside a conversation. 15 MB. Train this AFTER a chat corpus, not from scratch. Recommended for tiny models (10M-80M parameters). Hosted at carpathian-llc/Veritate-Corpus.

corpora.label: Agent tools (medium, 150 MB)
corpora.description: Same tool-use content as the small corpus at 10x scale. 150 MB. Train after a chat corpus. Recommended for mid-size models (200M-1B parameters).

corpora.label: Agent tools (large, 1.5 GB)
corpora.description: Same tool-use content as the small corpus at 100x scale. 1.5 GB. Train after a chat corpus. Recommended for large models (1B-50B parameters).

corpora.label: Model Context Protocol docs
corpora.description: The complete modelcontextprotocol.io documentation: the 2025-11-25 specification, build guides, SDK and registry docs, governance. ~2 MB. Ships inside Veritate — installing copies it from the repo, no download. Domain corpus: fine-tune a chat model on it rather than training from scratch.

corpora.label: Tiny Shakespeare
corpora.description: All Shakespeare's works concatenated. ~1 MB. Classic warmup corpus.

corpora.label: TinyStories
corpora.description: Synthetic short children's stories (Eldan & Li, 2023). ~1 GB streamed. Designed for 1M-50M parameter models.

corpora.label: FineWeb-Edu (sample-10BT)
corpora.description: Educational subset of FineWeb (HuggingFaceFW). The 10B-token sample shard, ~5 GB streamed. Sized for Chinchilla-optimal training of 50M-500M parameter byte-level models.

corpora.label: WikiText-103
corpora.description: Curated Wikipedia article subset (Salesforce, raw). ~500 MB streamed. Good fit for 30M-200M parameter models.

corpora.label: enwik8
corpora.description: First 100 MB of English Wikipedia (Hutter Prize). Classic char-level benchmark. 5M-50M params.

corpora.label: PG-19 (Project Gutenberg pre-1919)
corpora.description: Long-form English books published before 1919 (DeepMind PG-19). Public domain. Capped at 10 GB stream. 50M+ parameter models.

corpora.label: OpenWebText (10 GB subset)
corpora.description: GPT-2-style web crawl (Skylion007). Streamed and capped at 10 GB. 100M-500M parameter models.

corpora.label: The Pile (uncopyrighted, 50 GB subset)
corpora.description: Curated multi-source mix (academic, code, web, books, dialogue). Streamed and capped at 50 GB. Chinchilla-fits 500M-3B parameter models.

corpora.label: SlimPajama (6B-token public subset)
corpora.description: Cleaned and deduplicated RedPajama sample (DKYoon public mirror). No auth required. ~22 GB of text, streamed in full. Chinchilla-fits 100M-500M parameter models.

corpora.label: RedPajama-V2 (200 GB subset)
corpora.description: Common Crawl filtered corpus (Together). Streamed and capped at 200 GB. Sized for Chinchilla-optimal training of 10B+ parameter models at default cap; raise for full 30T tokens.
